Minor'S Compromise Hearing.

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Philip C. Snell, Esq. appeared with petitioner Manju Sharma, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minors Roshani Sangar and Shivali Sangar, both of whom were present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount as to Roshani Sangar - $550,000.00
Attorney's Fees - $142,716.52
Medical Expenses - $25,800.54.
Costs - $325,176.46.

A net balance of $56,306.48 shall be used for the purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Attachment 7b(2)(b).

Settlement Amount as to Shivali Sangar - $550,000.00
Attorney's Fees - $142,716.52.
Medical Expenses - $25,800.54.
Costs - $319,407.93.

A net balance of $62,075.01 shall be used for the purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Attachment 7b(2)(b).

Orders Approving the Compromise of the Disputed Claim of each of the minors were submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Set For Trial On Jan-12-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-30-08 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 502
